title: Multi-thread contact depth doubled across the book this quarter
anchor: Average contacts per account sits at 4.6 this quarter, up from 2.3 last quarter.
connect: Accounts at 4-plus contacts renew at 91% versus 67% at single-thread depth.
body: Average contacts per account sits at 4.6 this quarter, up from 2.3 last quarter. Accounts at 4-plus contacts renew at 91% versus 67% at single-thread depth.
trace: Multi-thread expansion from 18 to 38 accounts at the 4+ contact threshold represents a structural shift in relationship depth across the book.

title: Champion re-engagement events tripled in April
anchor: 9 accounts where champions had gone 14-plus days silent received confirmed responses in April, up from 3 in March.
connect: 7 of those 9 accounts crossed back to green health scores within 21 days of re-engagement.
body: 9 accounts where champions had gone 14-plus days silent received confirmed responses in April, up from 3 in March. 7 of those 9 accounts crossed back to green health scores within 21 days of re-engagement.
trace: Champion gap recovery shows the value of proactive outreach to dormant primary contacts across the book.

title: Strategic tier stakeholder maps hit 84% freshness
anchor: 21 of 25 strategic accounts show stakeholder map updates within the last 30 days, up from 14 of 25 in February.
connect: Strategic accounts with fresh stakeholder maps renew 22 points higher than those without.
body: 21 of 25 strategic accounts show stakeholder map updates within the last 30 days, up from 14 of 25 in February. Strategic accounts with fresh stakeholder maps renew 22 points higher than those without.
trace: Stakeholder map currency improvement from 56% to 84% in strategic tier directly correlates with renewal outcome predictability.

title: Book coverage hits highest two-week interaction rate since Q4
anchor: 44 of 47 active accounts show CSM-logged interactions within the past 14 days.
connect: This marks the highest two-week outreach coverage recorded since Q4 2025.
body: 44 of 47 active accounts show CSM-logged interactions within the past 14 days. This marks the highest two-week outreach coverage recorded since Q4 2025.
trace: Book-wide interaction coverage at 94% represents consistent relationship maintenance across the full portfolio.

title: Q3 renewal pipeline carries $1.8M across 18 accounts
anchor: Executive sponsor touch logged in last 30 days for 14 of 18 Q3 renewal accounts.
connect: Renewals with executive engagement in the 90 days before close at 89% versus 61% without.

trace: Q3 pipeline executive coverage at 78% provides strong renewal predictability foundation for the upcoming quarter.

title: Six accounts pulled renewals forward to Q2
anchor: Combined ARR of $420K from accounts originally tracking to Q3 or Q4 closed early in Q2.
connect: 5 of 6 had been flagged green for two consecutive months before the early-commit conversation.

trace: Early renewal pattern shows green health scores sustained over two months predict pull-forward readiness.

title: Mid-market GRR jumped seven points in Q2
anchor: 31 of 33 mid-market accounts renewed in Q2 for 94% GRR, up from 28 of 33 in Q1 at 87%.
connect: ICP-aligned mid-market accounts carried 86% of the Q2 renewal lift.

trace: Mid-market segment improvement concentrated in ICP-aligned accounts suggests fit-driven retention strength.

title: Lighthouse QBR expanded buying committee from three to six contacts

connect: Buying committees that grow during the renewal window close 28 points higher than those that stay flat.
